name: McKay-Thompson series of class 4D for the Monster group.
formula: Expansion of chi(-x)^12 in powers of x where chi() is a Ramanujan theta function.
G.f. is a period 1 Fourier series which satisfies f(-1 / (8 t)) = 64 g(t) where q = exp(2 Pi i t) and g() is the g.f. for A022577. - _Michael Somos_, Jul 22 2011
a(n) = (-1)^n * A112142(n). (class 8B). Convolution inverse of A022577. - _Michael Somos_, Jul 22 2011
a(0) = 1, a(n) = -(12/n)*Sum_{k=1..n} A000593(k)*a(n-k) for n > 0. - _Seiichi Manyama_, Apr 05 2017
Expansion of q^(1/2)*(eta(q)/eta(q^2))^12 in powers of q. - _G. C. Greubel_, Feb 13 2018
Empirical: Sum_{n>=0} a(n) / exp(n*Pi) = 2 * exp(-Pi / 2) * sqrt(2) = A388182. - _Simon Plouffe_, Sep 15 2025
program: (PARI) {a(n) = local(A); if( n<0, 0, A = x * O(x^n); polcoeff( (eta(x + A) / eta(x^2 + A))^12, n))} /* _Michael Somos_, Jul 22 2011 */
